# ConduitScore

> AI visibility scanner that scores any website 0–100 for discoverability by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, and other AI agents. Provides 7-category breakdown with copy-paste code fixes.

## Key Pages

- https://conduitscore.com/ — Free AI visibility scanner (homepage)
- https://conduitscore.com/pricing — Pricing plans ($0, $29, $49, $79/mo)
- https://conduitscore.com/about — About ConduitScore and our methodology
- https://conduitscore.com/methodology — How the 0–100 ConduitScore is calculated
- https://conduitscore.com/what-conduit-checks — What each of the 7 categories checks
- https://conduitscore.com/docs — Documentation and guides
- https://conduitscore.com/blog — AI visibility blog
- https://conduitscore.com/contact — Contact information
- https://conduitscore.com/sample-reports/low-score — Sample report: low-scoring site
- https://conduitscore.com/sample-reports/mid-score — Sample report: mid-scoring site
- https://conduitscore.com/sample-reports/high-score — Sample report: high-scoring site

## Use Cases

- https://conduitscore.com/use-cases/saas — AI visibility for SaaS products
- https://conduitscore.com/use-cases/ecommerce — AI visibility for ecommerce sites
- https://conduitscore.com/use-cases/agencies — AI visibility for digital agencies
